action.reasoning: Observation: the augmented 8-epoch run completed reliably with DataParallel and slightly improved source-val accuracy to 0.689, but we have not yet measured whether Quickdraw accuracy improved over the 0.1431 baseline. Analysis: source-val is only weakly correlated with target Quickdraw, so the highest-value next action is to submit eval on the new checkpoint before spending more training time. Given the long 61-minute iteration, we should avoid another expensive run until we know if these augmentations help target performance. Decision: submit the new best checkpoint for evaluation now; no code changes needed this iteration.
